issues.title: Invalid include path ../Hardware/Inc
evidence: Historical KeilBridge model flagged a missing include path under ../Hardware/Inc before the current repair baseline.
issues.repair: Removed the nonexistent include path from the target IncludePath list.
issues.validation: Current model.json contains 7 existing include paths and no known missing include path entries.

issues.title: Invalid include path ../Hardware/Display
evidence: Historical KeilBridge model flagged a missing include path under ../Hardware/Display before the current repair baseline.
issues.repair: Removed the nonexistent display include path from the target IncludePath list.
issues.validation: Current model.json contains only existing include paths for Core, CMSIS, HAL, and FreeRTOS GCC portable directories.

issues.title: Startup system source pointed to missing CMSIS template
evidence: Historical KeilBridge model flagged the startup companion system file path as missing before the current repair baseline.
issues.repair: Repointed the target system source entry to Core/Src/system_stm32f4xx.c.
issues.validation: Current model.json lists Core/Src/system_stm32f4xx.c in the Startup group.

issues.title: FreeRTOS port.c pointed to missing RVDS port
evidence: Historical KeilBridge model flagged the RVDS FreeRTOS portable path as missing before the current repair baseline.
issues.repair: Switched the target source entry to Middlewares/Third_Party/FreeRTOS/Source/portable/GCC/ARM_CM4F/port.c.
issues.validation: Current model.json lists the GCC ARM_CM4F port.c source in the FreeRTOS group.

issues.title: Main project source-group coverage is incomplete for current production code
evidence: inspect.txt reports Sources: 33 and only four groups: Core, FreeRTOS, HAL Driver, Startup.
Core/Src/main.c includes fatfs.h and libjpeg.h, but the main Keil target does not currently list FATFS or LIBJPEG groups.
Core/Src/freertos.c uses UI/LVGL/display/touch headers and init paths, but the main Keil target does not currently list UI or LVGL groups.
issues.repair: Add the missing production groups and source entries incrementally, validating after each slice with KeilBridge model and UV4 rebuild.

issues.title: No explicit scatter file configured in main target
evidence: inspect.txt lists only a scatter candidate at MDK-ARM/ai_tempconroler/ai_tempconroler.sct.
issues.repair: Decide whether to keep generated scatter behavior or bind the discovered .sct explicitly in the Keil target.

issues.title: KeilBridge cannot infer memory from target metadata
evidence: model.json target.memory is an empty array for ai_tempconroler.
issues.repair: Confirm whether device database matching or explicit memory/scatter configuration should be added for deterministic linker generation analysis.

issues.title: Startup file may rely on ARMASM syntax
issues.repair: Keep under review while validating ARM Compiler 6 compatibility and any backend conversion steps.
